# Count proc events (process exec anomaly)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

Process-execution frequency / anomaly hunting — surface noisy or rare binaries per host. Count proc events.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS and event_sub_type = ENUM.PROCESS_START | comp count() as execs | fields execs
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 1). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
